title: marrubium peregrinum var. creticum
intro: Marrubium peregrinum var. creticum, also known as Cretan horehound, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils and glycosides, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Marrubium peregrinum var. creticum include its expectorant properties, which help relieve respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Cretan horehound are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
